hooks.command: root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/ibr-pre-change.sh"; if [ -x "$hook" ]; then "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/ibr-post-change.sh"; if [ -x "$hook" ]; then "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
root="${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}"; hook="$root/hooks/ibr-loop-hook.sh"; if [ -x "$hook" ]; then "$hook"; else printf '{}'; fi
